scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,ADMIN,MOBILE" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.dev:api: dotenv -e apps/text-me-api/.env.dev -- npx nx serve text-me-api
scripts.dev:api:dev: dotenv -e apps/text-me-api/.env.dev -- npx nx serve text-me-api
scripts.dev:api:stage: dotenv -e apps/text-me-api/.env.stage -- npx nx serve text-me-api
scripts.dev:api:prod: dotenv -e apps/text-me-api/.env.prod -- npx nx serve text-me-api
scripts.dev:admin: dotenv -e apps/text-me-admin/.env.dev -- npx nx serve text-me-admin
scripts.dev:admin:dev: dotenv -e apps/text-me-admin/.env.dev -- npx nx serve text-me-admin
scripts.dev:admin:stage: dotenv -e apps/text-me-admin/.env.stage -- npx nx serve text-me-admin
scripts.dev:admin:prod: dotenv -e apps/text-me-admin/.env.prod -- npx nx serve text-me-admin
scripts.dev:mobile: dotenv -e apps/text-me/.env.dev -- npx nx start text-me
scripts.dev:mobile:dev: dotenv -e apps/text-me/.env.dev -- npx nx start text-me
scripts.dev:mobile:stage: dotenv -e apps/text-me/.env.stage -- npx nx start text-me
scripts.dev:mobile:prod: dotenv -e apps/text-me/.env.prod -- npx nx start text-me
scripts.dev:all:stage: concurrently --names "API,ADMIN,MOBILE" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev:api:stage" "npm run dev:admin:stage" "npm run dev:mobile:stage"
scripts.dev:all:prod: concurrently --names "API,ADMIN,MOBILE" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev:api:prod" "npm run dev:admin:prod" "npm run dev:mobile:prod"
scripts.build:api: dotenv -e apps/text-me-api/.env.prod -- npx nx build text-me-api
scripts.build:api:dev: dotenv -e apps/text-me-api/.env.dev -- npx nx build text-me-api
scripts.build:api:stage: dotenv -e apps/text-me-api/.env.stage -- npx nx build text-me-api
scripts.build:api:prod: dotenv -e apps/text-me-api/.env.prod -- npx nx build text-me-api
scripts.build:admin: dotenv -e apps/text-me-admin/.env.prod -- npx nx build text-me-admin
scripts.build:admin:dev: dotenv -e apps/text-me-admin/.env.dev -- npx nx build text-me-admin
scripts.build:admin:stage: dotenv -e apps/text-me-admin/.env.stage -- npx nx build text-me-admin
scripts.build:admin:prod: dotenv -e apps/text-me-admin/.env.prod -- npx nx build text-me-admin
